defaults.hook_text: HAALAND EATS BEEF HEART EVERY WEEK
defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close-up interview or match shot of Erling Haaland's recognizable face filling the frame

a wide football match with tiny players

videos.video_subject: The unusual diet behind Erling Haaland's incredible fitness, including eating beef heart and organ meat every week as part of his nutrition plan
videos.video_script: Erling Haaland eats beef heart and organ meat every week. His nutrition team says it's packed with nutrients regular meat lacks. It's one part of the extreme routine behind his freakish fitness.
videos.video_terms: Erling Haaland diet nutrition, Erling Haaland eating organ meat, Erling Haaland gym training, Erling Haaland close up interview
